title: Tru'eb Cholakk

'''Tru'eb Cholakk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked together with [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]. He was tall and preferred to wear gray and black tunics. His voice was deep and resonant, which gave his speech a pinch of respectable pride.

==Biography==
[[File:TruebCholakkTrial-PlattsStarportGuide.jpg|thumb|300px|left|Tru'eb Cholakk on trial.]]
Son of a [[Kala'uun's head-clan|head-clan]] [[Tru'eb Cholakk's father|member]] of the [[Ryloth/Legends|Rylothian]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]], Tru'eb dreamed of one day leading his people. Unfortunately, he was kidnapped by his cousin [[Ku'amar]] and given to slavers. Eventually, he ended up in the hand of [[Quintik Kahr|Big Quince]] who made him his personal servant.

While in the custody of Big Quince, Tru'eb befriended a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] girl called [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] and together they managed to escape the clutches of the [[Sludir]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]]. Okeefe taught Tru'eb about spaceship piloting and helped him buy the ''[[Luudrian Star]]''. Tru'eb specialized in gunrunning, supplying the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] with much needed weaponry, and continued to serve the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He primarily operated in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. He would also work with the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group, the [[Black Curs]] under the leadership of [[Dirk Harkness]]. He was present at [[Gorkin's Rest]] when Harkness told the tale of how he lost the love of his life [[Chessa Dohhenty]] and joined the Rebels.<ref name="AJ1">{{JournalCite|1|Chessa's Doom}}</ref>

While on a reconnaissance mission in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], he and the rest of the Black Curs were shot down over the planet [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]]. While Harkness went to look for help, Cholakk stayed behind with the [[Last Chance (YT-1300 light freighter)/Legends|''Last Chance'']] to defend the ship and assist with repairs. After his colleague Platt Okeefe was captured by Golthan and taken to his stronghold, Cholakk recruited some beings to assist in a rescue mission. He flew them to the Black Curs' base and gave them a briefing on their plans to rescue Okeefe. After the group was able to infiltrate and bring down the defenses of Golthan's base, Cholakk flew his freighter to extract the team.<ref name="BCB">{{JournalCite|8|Black Curs Blues}}</ref>

Cholakk was a distant relative of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Lonay]].<ref name="SESB">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>
